proof: function[T0](x0: Set[T0] -> Bool) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not x0(x1) or x0(x1.c) } = closed_under_compl_constraint[T0](x0) }[K](m.is_measurable)
(forall(x0: Set[K]) { not m.is_measurable(x0) or m.is_measurable(x0.c) } = true)
function(x0: Set[K]) { not (m.is_measurable(x0) and not m.is_measurable(x0.c)) }(s)

goal: closed_under_countable_union_constraint[K](m.is_measurable) = forall(x0: Nat -> Set[K]) { forall(x1: Nat) { m.is_measurable(x0(x1)) } implies m.is_measurable(indexed_union[K, Nat](x0)) }
proof: function[T0](x0: Set[T0] -> Bool) { forall(x1: Nat -> Set[T0]) { exists(k0: Nat) { not x0(x1(k0)) } or x0(indexed_union[T0, Nat](x1)) } = closed_under_countable_union_constraint[T0](x0) }[K](m.is_measurable)
(forall(x0: Nat -> Set[K]) { exists(k0: Nat) { not m.is_measurable(x0(k0)) } or m.is_measurable(indexed_union[K, Nat](x0)) } = true)
function(x0: Nat -> Set[K]) { not (forall(x1: Nat) { m.is_measurable(x0(x1)) } and not m.is_measurable(indexed_union[K, Nat](x0))) }(family)
function(x0: Nat -> Set[K]) { not forall(x1: Nat) { m.is_measurable(x0(x1)) } or m.is_measurable(indexed_union[K, Nat](x0)) }(family)
let w0: Nat satisfy { not m.is_measurable(family(w0)) }
let w0: K satisfy { w0 ∈ Set.universal_set[K] != w0 ∈ Set.empty_set[K].c }
let w0: Nat satisfy { not m.is_measurable(family(w0).c) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { not m.is_measurable(family(w0)) }
function[T0](x0: Set[T0] -> Bool) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not x0(x1) or x0(x1.c) } = closed_under_compl_constraint[T0](x0) }[K](discrete_measurable[K])
let w0: Set[K] satisfy { discrete_measurable[K](w0) and not discrete_measurable[K](w0.c) }

function[T0](x0: Set[T0] -> Bool) { forall(x1: Nat -> Set[T0]) { exists(k0: Nat) { not x0(x1(k0)) } or x0(indexed_union[T0, Nat](x1)) } = closed_under_countable_union_constraint[T0](x0) }[K](discrete_measurable[K])
let w0: Nat -> Set[K] satisfy { forall(x0: Nat) { discrete_measurable[K](w0(x0)) } and not discrete_measurable[K](indexed_union[K, Nat](w0)) }
function[T0](x0: Set[T0] -> Bool) { not SigmaAlgebra.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: SigmaAlgebra[T0]) { SigmaAlgebra.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[SigmaAlgebra[T0]](k0) } }[K](discrete_measurable[K])

function[T0](x0: Set[T0] -> Bool) { (has_measurable_empty_constraint[T0](x0) and closed_under_compl_constraint[T0](x0) and closed_under_countable_union_constraint[T0](x0)) = SigmaAlgebra.constraint[T0](x0) }[K](discrete_measurable[K])

function[T0](x0: SigmaAlgebra[T0], x1: Set[T0] -> Bool, x2: Set[T0]) { Option.some[SigmaAlgebra[T0]](x0) != SigmaAlgebra.new[T0](x1) or x0.is_measurable(x2) = x1(x2) }[K](discrete_sigma_algebra[K], discrete_measurable[K], s)
